rows.label: tev045801_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev045801_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Heptana about the Bias way of life.

rows.label: tev045801_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev045801_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Heptana about recent developments.

rows.label: tev045801_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Heptana about indigens in Cauldros.

rows.label: tev045801_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Heptana about recent developments.

rows.label: tev045801_SEL2011
rows.name: Ask Heptana about indigens in Cauldros.

rows.label: tev045801_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Heptana about recent developments.

rows.label: tev045801_SEL3011
rows.name: Ask Heptana about indigens in Cauldros.

rows.label: tev045801_SEL3021
rows.name: Ask Heptana about recent developments.

rows.label: tev045801_MSG0001
rows.name:
You Earth aliens make
food in your plant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG0002
rows.name:
But Bias do not. We only hunt beasts
in nature. Hunt by our own two hands.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG0003
rows.name:
Males learn to hunt when they come of age.
Females learn how to control beasts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG0004
rows.name:
But there are exceptions. Like me. I
grew up hunting with my brothers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG0005
rows.name:
But so long as I live off
land, I remain true Bias![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG0010
rows.name:
Most Bias males are brave
warriors. But some are not.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG0011
rows.name:
Take Nemard. He was held by
Growth in same cell as me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG0012
rows.name:
Nemard is hopeless. Cannot hunt to save
his life. He is barely Bias at all![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG0013
rows.name:
It's lucky I am around to hold hand. I
don't know what he would do otherwise.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG0014
rows.name:
I doubt he has slain single beast since
coming here. He is probably starving.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG0015
rows.name:
So I will do favor and hunt imp lophid
so he can eat. Just this once.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG1001
rows.name:
I have been seeking advice about Cauldros.
Me and Nemard will go there soon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG1002
rows.name: It seems Cauldros is fascinating.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG1003
rows.name:
For example, it has giant fish called
balaena. If you destroy whiskers, you can
sometimes obtain lucky rainbow whisker.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG1004
rows.name:
Legend says couple who wears lucky rainbow
whisker will live out lives together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG1005
rows.name:
So I will hunt balaenas and grab
future for Nemard and me two
whiskers at time! Haw haw haw![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG1010
rows.name:
Nemard's hunting improves
by leaps and bounds.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG1011
rows.name:
We now have more delicious
meat than we can eat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG1012
rows.name:
Maybe we should make
little mouths to feed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG1013
rows.name:
Yes! Me and Nemard must build huge
family! One to make all Bias proud![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG2001
rows.name:
I have one less distraction.
Now I can focus on hunt.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG2002
rows.name:
It seems Cauldros has interesting
beasts. Might be worth exploring.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG2003
rows.name:
For example, it has giant fish called
balaena. If you destroy whiskers, you can
sometimes obtain lucky rainbow whisker.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG2004
rows.name:
This material can be
sold for high price![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG2005
rows.name:
You should go to Cauldros. Hunt what you
can. Make small fortune. Or large one![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG2010
rows.name:
Helpless girl like Enneana is good fit for
helpless boy like Nemard. Keeping her safe
will force him to be true Bias man.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG2011
rows.name:
I wanted to be with him. But what
can I say? They are better fit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG2012
rows.name:
Let them live happy, stupid
lives. It is better this way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG2013
rows.name:
Now I live for hunt. No
mate will burden me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG3001
rows.name:
I hear that continent has
monsters you would not believe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG3002
rows.name:
Great giants called Gularth lurk
in lava pools. They are big enough
to crush you beneath foot![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG3003
rows.name:
And beast called tersqual breathes
searing fire. All nearby are
charred like overcooked meat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG3004
rows.name:
I cannot visit such place
now that I have family...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG3005
rows.name:
You also should also not venture
into such peril without preparation.
Many would miss you if you died.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG3010
rows.name:
Me and Nemard will make family big
enough to impress Grandfather Auld! Ha![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG3011
rows.name: But big family needs much meat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev045801_MSG3012
rows.name:
So there is no time to mourn. We
must continue hunt. Slaughter beasts.
It is only way to ensure future![ST:wait ]
